content.en:
After killing all these Blood River Behemoths, Ye Tiancai did not continue to be attacked.

"This should be the territory of the Blood River Behemoth!"

Ye Tian guessed.

There are so many Blood River Giant Beasts, among them, there is also an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse comparable to the Boundary Breaking Level, if the Eight Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Geniuses from the outside world come here, I am afraid that there is a risk of falling, so I can only choose to escape.

And when an ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse came here, I am afraid that it would have to fall into a box.

"It's no wonder that the Lord of Darkness doesn't recommend that ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses of the Dark Sea come to the ruins of the Dragon Sea, they are a little unlucky, and they will land directly into a box!

Ye Tian thought so.

He didn't look for resources in the first place, but started to replicate the body here.

He didn't want to fall in the ruins of the Dragon Sea, which directly led to the loss of this opportunity.

After all, even the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm is at risk of falling, so he is also at risk of falling.

Therefore, it is safer to make one more copy of the body and stay here.

Soon, a replica body was copied.

"Let's copy the body of the Blood River Behemoth that has changed into the Eight Blood Transformation Realm just now!"

Ye Tian quickly copied out a Blood River Giant Beast's copy body.

Subsequently.

The two replica bodies stayed in this area, while Ye Tian's other replica body began to look for resources and explore other areas.

......

"There are really a lot of resources, and the Blood River Behemoth Beast Territory has bred so many resources!"

Ye Tian collected a large number of resources one by one, but took away all the good value.

"It's a pity that I haven't found a resource that can help me continue to refine my heart!"

Such resources are very rare, even in the ruins of the dragon sea, it is not easy to find, otherwise those eight blood transformation realm primeval level geniuses who entered the ruins of the dragon sea will not have broken through since the primeval era.

After scraping the resources in this area, Ye Tian continued to move forward and went to other areas to find resources.

The ruins of the dragon sea are very large, this is a place comparable to territorial waters, and the area is terrifying.

And their strength here has been suppressed, so the speed of rushing is naturally very slow, and it is basically unrealistic to find the entire Longhai Ruins.

Therefore, they are not afraid of not being able to find resources, the only problem is that there are many dangers, even if they are nine Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level geniuses, they have to be careful to find opportunities, and they dare not break in casually.

However, Ye Tian was not afraid of falling, so he broke into various areas indiscriminately, and it was just a big deal that this replica body fell.

Anyway, he will send the resources back one by one, and there will be no big loss if he replicates the fall of his body.

this day.

Ye Tian finally encountered danger.

A monster covered in pitch black, a blow pierced Ye Tian's body, killing him in seconds.

......

"That creature just now is terrifying, it is definitely comparable to the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm, and if you kill me with one blow, I can't even resist!" Ye Tian affirmed.

After all, with his current strength, even an ancient-level genius in the Nine Blood Transformation Realm could at least resist for a while, and he wouldn't be killed in seconds.

After all, he now has a lot of immeasurable bones in his body that have been transformed into bones, and his combat power can far surpass that of ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realm prime-level geniuses.

Therefore, the creature that can kill him in an instant is inevitably comparable to the bone transformation realm.

Even if the Lord of Darkness came here and his strength was suppressed, he might not be able to beat this creature, and he might have to flee for his life.

He didn't dare trouble the creature again, so he chose to avoid the area.

Before he knew it, he had come to the territory of another Blood Transformation Realm race.

"Platinum Mantis!"

This is the name of the Blood Transformation Realm race.

After Ye Tian came here, he was directly besieged by a group of platinum mantises, and the leader of the team was a creature comparable to an ancient genius in the Eight Blood Transformation Realm.

Of course, it is not an ancient-level genius, but under the suppression of strength, it can exert such strength.

Thundered!!!!

After a fight, Ye Tian prepared to escape.

Abrupt.

A tentacle instantly emerged from nothingness, piercing his body with a single blow.

The next moment, a platinum mantis comparable to a Nine Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level geniuses appeared, constantly attacking Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't last long before he was killed.

......

"This platinum mantis race is not weak, you can copy the body of a platinum mantis and mix it in!" Ye Tian decided.

Not long after, Ye Tian successfully copied the body of an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Platinum Mantis, but it was just an ordinary Platinum Mantis, which was inconspicuous, but its status would not be too low.

In the following years, Ye Tian gradually blended in and learned about the strength of this platinum mantis race.

"I didn't expect that there are six clansmen of this platinum mantis race who are comparable to the strength of the nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level geniuses, and they are really powerful!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, if these platinum mantis go to the boundary crack of territorial waters, they are naturally weak chickens, but they are invincible here.

And the platinum mantis is very powerful, and it naturally occupies a lot of resources.

Soon, he discovered that the Platinum Mantis had an incomparably precious resource, which was of great help to him in refining his heart.

"Platinum blood marrow!"

This kind of resource is very rare even for the Platinum Mantis clan, and every clansman can only get a drop for a long time, and not every clansman has it.

This platinum blood marrow fluid is stored in the root system of the platinum mantis clan's platinum god tree, where there is a small space, and at the same time, the root system of the platinum god tree is also giving birth to the platinum blood marrow fluid and flowing into this small space.

Due to the strict hierarchy of the Platinum Mantis, the weak Platinum Mantis would never dare to disobey the order, so no Platinum Mantis would steal these Platinum Blood Mantis.

"I can steal these platinum blood marrow fluids, and once I steal them all, I will make a lot of money!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, there was a platinum mantis comparable to a primordial-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm who had been sitting here for a long time, and if he wanted to steal these platinum blood marrow fluids, he had to lure them away.

He thought about it carefully and thought for a long time before he came up with a good solution.

"It's still the old way before, copy the body of the platinum mantis, and then make trouble with other blood transformation realm creature powerhouses. I remember that not very far from here, there was a very terrifying primeval blood crocodile, whose strength was much more terrifying than that of an ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level genius. I can kill its descendants and blame the Platinum Mantis for war. At that time, the platinum mantis guarding that small space will definitely go to support, and then this will be my chance!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
